entries.claim: Claude Projects is a saved workspace feature on claude.ai (Anthropic) that lets users add project instructions and reference files, loaded automatically into every conversation in that project
entries.source_quote_he: Projects allow you to organize your conversations and add custom instructions and knowledge files that Claude can reference in every conversation within that project.

entries.claim: ChatGPT GPTs are custom versions of ChatGPT created by users with their own instructions, knowledge files, and optional actions; require ChatGPT Plus (approximately $20/month) to create
entries.source_quote_he: GPTs are custom versions of ChatGPT that you can create for a specific purpose. Available to ChatGPT Plus, Team, and Enterprise users.

entries.claim: Gemini Gems are Google's custom assistant feature in gemini.google.com, with tight integration to Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Drive, Calendar)
entries.source_quote_he: Gems let you create your own custom version of Gemini with specific instructions and personality, integrated with Google Workspace.

entries.claim: Israel VAT rate is 18% effective January 2025
entries.source_quote_he: שיעור המע"מ עומד על 18 אחוז החל מ-1 בינואר 2025.

entries.claim: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool, self-hostable, with free tier for personal use
entries.source_quote_he: n8n is fair-code licensed (Sustainable Use License). Self-hosting is free for personal and internal business use.

entries.claim: Make.com (formerly Integromat) is a visual no-code automation builder with a large library of pre-built integrations and a free tier
entries.source_quote_he: Make offers a free plan with 1,000 operations per month and access to thousands of pre-built integrations.

entries.claim: Zapier is the no-code automation tool with the largest number of app integrations (7000+) as of 2025
entries.source_quote_he: Zapier connects with 7,000+ apps to automate work across them.

entries.claim: n8n-hebrew-workflows is a published skill in the skills-il catalog covering Israeli no-code automation with n8n (37 installs)
entries.source_quote_he: n8n Hebrew Workflows. 37 installs. Covers israeli-bank-scrapers, Morning, data.gov.il, Hebrew handling, Shabbat-aware scheduling.

entries.claim: make-com-israeli-automations is a published skill in the skills-il catalog covering Make.com automations for Israeli businesses (32 installs)
entries.source_quote_he: Make.com Israeli Automations. 32 installs. Covers Morning, iCount, Monday.com, Cardcom, Tranzila, Israel Invoice Reform 2026.

entries.claim: israeli-personal-assistant is a published skill covering Israeli daily-context reference (Sunday-Thursday work week, holidays, formal Hebrew email norms)
entries.source_quote_he: Israeli Daily Reference Guide. Reference for Israeli daily context: work week (Sunday-Thursday), holidays and observances, business obligation reminders (VAT, Bituach Leumi), local communication norms, formal Hebrew writing.

entries.claim: israeli-customer-support-automator is a published skill (75 installs) covering deployed AI-powered customer support automation for Israeli businesses, including Hebrew ticket classification, Sunday-Thursday business hours SLA, and escalation rules per Israeli Consumer Protection Law 1981
entries.source_quote_he: Israeli Customer Support Automator. 75 installs. Hebrew ticket classification, SLA for Sunday-Thursday business hours, escalation rules per Israeli Consumer Protection Law 1981.

entries.claim: Israeli freelance accountants (osek murshe) file monthly VAT reports via gov.il VAT portal
entries.source_quote_he: הגשת דו"ח מע"מ תקופתי דרך אזור האישי באתר רשות המסים. עוסקים מורשים מגישים חודשית או דו־חודשית בהתאם להנחיות.

entries.claim: Section 14 of the Severance Pay Law (חוק פיצויי פיטורין סעיף 14) allows employer pension contributions to substitute for end-of-employment severance, changing the severance calculation for employees under such arrangements
entries.source_quote_he: סעיף 14 לחוק פיצויי פיטורים מאפשר למעסיק להפקיד תשלומים שוטפים לקרן פנסיה או לתוכנית ביטוח, ובמקרה כזה התשלומים יבואו במקום פיצויי הפיטורים שלהם היה זכאי העובד.

entries.claim: Google's consumer paid AI tier (currently branded Google AI Pro) is priced approximately ₪97.90/month in Israel as of 2026; rebrands have occurred over time (previously Google One AI Premium)
entries.source_quote_he: Google AI Pro plan in Israel: approximately ₪97.90 / month. Includes Gemini Advanced (formerly Gemini Ultra access), 2TB storage, and Workspace AI features.
